summary: Comprehensive testing of season data isolation feature completed successfully. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). UI testing verified season switching and data isolation in the frontend.

season_activation_switching.ui_verified: Season switching via Activate button works correctly. Toast notification shows 'Season activated'. Active season badge (ACTIVE) updates correctly.

birds_global_not_season_filtered.result: Birds count remains 13 regardless of active season. UI shows '13 birds (6 males, 4 females)' in both seasons.

pairs_season_isolation.result: Temporada 2025: 1 pair visible. Temporada 2026: 0 pairs visible ('No pairs registered' empty state).

zones_season_isolation.result: Temporada 2025: 1 zone visible. Temporada 2026: 0 zones visible.

clutches_season_isolation.result: Temporada 2025: 1 clutch visible. Temporada 2026: 0 clutches visible.

dashboard_stats_season_isolation.result_2025: Total Birds: 13 (global), Total Pairs: 1, Total Clutches: 1, Active Pairs: 1, Laying: 1
dashboard_stats_season_isolation.result_2026: Total Birds: 13 (global), Total Pairs: 0, Total Clutches: 0, Active Pairs: 0, Laying: 0

create_data_in_active_season.result: New zones and pairs created in Temporada 2026 are correctly associated with season_id. Data only visible when that season is active.

backend_api_verification.get_zones_endpoint: Strict season isolation - returns only zones with matching season_id
backend_api_verification.get_pairs_endpoint: Strict season isolation - returns only pairs with matching season_id
backend_api_verification.get_clutches_endpoint: Strict season isolation - returns only clutches with matching season_id
backend_api_verification.get_cages_endpoint: Strict season isolation - returns only cages with matching season_id
backend_api_verification.get_dashboard_stats: Birds global (user_filter only), pairs/clutches filtered by season_filter
backend_api_verification.create_zone: Automatically associates with active season via get_active_season_id()
backend_api_verification.create_pair: Automatically associates with active season via get_active_season_id()
backend_api_verification.create_clutch: Automatically associates with active season via get_active_season_id()

ui_verification.seasons_page: Shows all seasons with Active badge on current season, Activate buttons for others
ui_verification.dashboard: Stats correctly reflect active season data (birds global, pairs/clutches filtered)
ui_verification.pairs_page: Shows empty state when season has no pairs, shows pairs for active season only
ui_verification.birds_page: Always shows all 13 birds regardless of season (global data)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user data: test_season@test.com with Temporada 2025 (1 pair, 1 zone, 1 clutch) and Temporada 2026 (empty). Test data created during testing was cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Season data isolation fully implemented and tested. Key implementation: get_active_season_id() helper function used by create endpoints to associate data with active season. Query filtering uses season_filter with season_id match for strict isolation. Birds remain global (no season_id filtering). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_season_data_isolation.py covers all isolation scenarios.
